creator: net@arrishq.net
text:
Created attachment 180305
Port update

Hello,

this is an update to Amanda (both server, client, perl-wrapper) to version 3.3.9 which includes some security fixes over the available version 3.3.6.
I've already contacted the port maintainer, but it looks my mail(s) got eaten by some mail provider.
Changes apart the previous port:

- using /var/db/amanda instead of ${PREFIX}/var/db/amanda because ${PREFIX} might be mounted read-only
- new configure option "--with-security-file" because Amanda reports strange errors if this configure option is missing at all

Port has been tested with Poudiere and the manual way, the server operation has been tested on FreeBSD 10.3 and 11.0, connecting to a mix of clients (Windows, Linux, FreeBSD).

Note: this port includes the proposed option change from bug report 215309
